title: kb.pillars.mutated v1
description: Emitted by hearth-api / hearth-mcp when the architectural pillars tree changes (kb_collections tree nodes or kb_collection_links edges). One event per mutation, aggregates + titles only — node `body` markdown is never carried on the bus. Added per the 2026-07-13 pillars adversarial review: pillar mutations were bus-silent, invisible to hermes digests, phone notifications, and kb-watch guidance.

node_id.description: The kb_collections id the mutation targets (for linked/unlinked: the from_id).

project.description: Project the node belongs to (hearth, tengine, ...).

name.description: Node name at mutation time (title only, never body).

kind.description: Node kind (pillar, screen, api, idea, story, ...). Freeform by design.

parent_id.description: Parent after the mutation (null = root). Present on created/reparented.

to_id.description: Cross-link target node id. Present on linked/unlinked.

relationship.description: Cross-link relationship label. Present on linked/unlinked.

descendants_deleted.description: For op=deleted: how many descendant nodes the cascade destroyed (the honest count, not rows_affected).

surface.description: Which write path produced the mutation.
